--- Lesley Groff lesley@nysgllc.com wrote:

From: Giulia Pistorio
[mailto:gpistorio@thecoreclub.com]
Sent: Wednesday, February 08, 2006 11:25 AM
To: LESLEY@NYSGLLC.COM
Subject: Limited Wine Dinner Slots

Dear Mr. Epstein,

I would like to share with you that our sold out
Harlan Wine Dinner this
evening has had a limited number of tables to become
available. I hope you
will consider joining us this evening.

Mr. Harlan will be here to speak of his prestigious
wines and Chef Dan has
prepared a spectacular menu. Please let me know if
you can make it.

All my best,

Giulia
